* 企业介绍
* 职位 · 37

瑞萨半导体（中国）作为全球著名的微控制器供应商、模拟功率器件和SoC产品的供应商，瑞萨电子为汽车、工业、家居(HE)、办公自动化(OA)、信息通信技术(ICT)等各种应用提供专业的技术支持、品质保证和综合的解决方案。为客户提供专业可信的创新嵌入式设计和完整的半导体解决方案，旨在通过使用其产品的数十亿联网智能设备安全可靠地改善人们的工作和生活方式。 瑞萨半导体在中国的销售和技术支持网点遍及北京、上海、深圳、苏州、天津、成都和香港等地。期待与您携手共创无限未来！ Renesas is one of the global semiconductor companies in the world. We strive to develop a safer, healthier, greener, and smarter world, and our goal is to make every endpoint intelligent by offering product solutions in the automotive, industrial, infrastructure and IoT markets. Our robust product portfolio includes world-leading MCUs, SoCs, analog and power products, plus Winning Combination solutions that curate these complementary products. We are a key supplier to the world’s leading manufacturers of electronics you rely on every day; you may not see our products, but they are all around you. Renesas employs roughly 21,000 people in more than 30 countries worldwide. As a global team, our employees actively embody the Renesas Culture, our guiding principles based on five key elements: Transparent, Agile, Global, Innovative, and Entrepreneurial. Renesas believes in, and has a commitment to, diversity and inclusion, with initiatives and a leadership team dedicated to its resources and values. At Renesas, we want to build a sustainable future where technology helps make our lives easier. Join us and build your future by being part of what’s next in electronics and the world.

* 企业介绍
* 职位 · 6

瑞萨是一家提供智能型芯片解决方案的半导体生产厂商，始终立足于泛网时代的前列。我们在移动通信、数码家电、汽车等与泛网最密切相关的领域，源源不断地为客户提供先进半导体产品及其应用技术，以支持客户所设计、制造的网络系统产品。例如，在全世界的汽车导航系统所使用的微控制器中，约有80%的产品来自瑞萨。同时，我们还在闪存内置的微控制器、移动电话用应用处理器、GSM移动电话用RF模块、移动电话用彩屏LCD驱动器等众多的产品领域，全球市场占有率均独占鳌头。在世界市场中，瑞萨很早就着眼于中国，并且不断的完善在中国的客户服务。瑞萨已经在北京、苏州、深圳、香港拥有设计、应用技术基地，同时还在北京和苏州设有制造基地。我们的销售网点已经遍及上海、香港、北京、深圳、厦门、青岛，今后还将不断扩大。与此同时，我们还将致力于中国的销售人员和销售技术人员的聘用与教育培训。 公司员工在涉及聘用、报酬、培训机会、晋升等事项上，不因其人种、民族、国籍、宗教、性别、性取向、婚姻状况、残疾、政治从属等与工作无关的因素而受到歧视。

# 瑞萨电子（中国）
N/A
Semiconductor Manufacturing • putuo dictrict, shanghai • 136 followers • 201-500 employees

## Overview
Renesas Electronics Corporation delivers trusted embedded design innovation with complete semiconductor solutions that enable billions of connected, intelligent devices to enhance the way people work and live—securely and safely. A global leader in microcontrollers, analog, power and SoC products, Renesas provides the expertise, quality, and comprehensive solutions for a broad range of Automotive, Industrial, Home Electronics (HE), Office Automation (OA) and Information Communication Technology (ICT) applications to help shape a limitless future.

**Harbour Cranes Australia China** (Oil and Gas): [https://au.linkedin.com/company/harbour-cranes-australia-china?trk=similar-pages](https://au.linkedin.com/company/harbour-cranes-australia-china?trk=similar-pages) (N/A); **China Machinery Technology Co., Limited** (Industrial Machinery Manufacturing): [https://cn.linkedin.com/company/cmtcgroup?trk=similar-pages](https://cn.linkedin.com/company/cmtcgroup?trk=similar-pages) (N/A); **China Administration Company Pty Ltd** (Oil and Gas): [https://au.linkedin.com/company/china-administration-company-pty-ltd?trk=similar-pages](https://au.linkedin.com/company/china-administration-company-pty-ltd?trk=similar-pages) (Perth, Western Australia); **普罗斯电器（中国）有限公司** (Appliances, Electrical, and Electronics Manufacturing): [https://cn.linkedin.com/company/%E6%99%AE%E7%BD%97%E6%96%AF%E7%94%B5%E5%99%A8%EF%BC%88%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%EF%BC%89%E6%9C%89%E9%99%90%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8?trk=similar-pages](https://cn.linkedin.com/company/%E6%99%AE%E7%BD%97%E6%96%AF%E7%94%B5%E5%99%A8%EF%BC%88%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%EF%BC%89%E6%9C%89%E9%99%90%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8?trk=similar-pages) (Changzhou, Jiangsu)

# Process Engineer

## This vacancy has now expired. Please see similar roles below...

职位描述

  

瑞萨半导体（北京）有限公司，是日本RENESAS电子株式会社旗下的全资子公司，注册资金高达9000余万美元，是RENESAS海外最大的生产工厂，主要从事半导体产品MCU（微处理器）的生产制造，MCU全球排名第三。

公司位于北京海淀区中关村科技园上地信息产业基地八街7号，占地面积约为15万平方米；环境优美、多次被评为“北京市花园式单位”；交通便利，紧邻地铁13号线及昌平线的西二旗站。

公司自成立以来，在重视基础建设的同时不断改善与创新，现拥有员工近700名，2栋工厂，月产高达9200万个产品的半导体后工序封装工厂，多次荣获北京市及海淀区政府颁发的各种荣誉证书，产品广泛应用在家用电脑、汽车、手机、电视、空调等各领域中。

公司非常重视人才培养，外聘技术专家及公司内部专员为技术者定期培训、材料生产厂家培训及出国培训，晋升机会大;有技术岗津贴、管理岗津贴、每年调薪6~10%、并发放过节费、年度表彰金、全勤奖金、年终奖金。

伴随企业规模不断扩大，为持续健康发展计划储备优秀人才，特此招纳贤士加入我司，携手共创辉煌。

【招聘职位】

1、职位名称：半导体封装技术工程师

2、工作地点：北京

3、需求人数：1人

【职位描述】

1、半导体封装工艺优化、成本递减、品质改善、生产效率提高

2、新品种开发、新材料引进、新技术开发

3、英文技术会议、英文报告

  

职位要求

  

**招聘要求：**

学历：全日制硕士及以上学历

专业：机械、电子、自动化、材料以及其他理工类专业

要求：

1、有欧美留学或欧美企业工作经验，擅长英语交流。

2、有电子行业工作经验者优先，其他制造行业经验者也可择优录取。

  

其他信息

  

Renesas is an embedded semiconductor solution provider driven by its Purpose ‘**To Make Our Lives Easier**.’ As the industry’s leading expert in embedded processing with unmatched quality and system-level know-how, we have evolved to provide scalable and comprehensive semiconductor solutions for automotive, industrial, infrastructure, and IoT industries based on the broadest product portfolio, including High Performance Computing, Embedded Processing, Analog & Connectivity, and Power.  
    
 With a diverse team of over 21,000 professionals in more than 30 countries, we continue to expand our boundaries to offer enhanced user experiences through digitalization and usher into a new era of innovation. We design and develop sustainable, power-efficient solutions today that help people and communities thrive tomorrow, ‘**To Make Our Lives Easier**.’       
    
 At Renesas, you can:

* **Launch and advance your career** in technical and business roles across four Product Groups and various corporate functions. You will have the opportunities to explore our hardware and software capabilities and try new things.

* **Make a real impact** by developing innovative products and solutions to meet our global customers' evolving needs and help make people’s lives easier, safe and secure.

* **Maximize your performance and wellbeing** in our flexible and inclusive work environment. Our people-first culture and global support system, including the remote work option and Employee Resource Groups, will help you excel from the first day.

Are you ready to own your success and make your mark?

Join Renesas. Let’s **Shape the Future** together.

Renesas Electronics is an equal opportunity and affirmative action employer, committed to supporting diversity and fostering a work environment free of discrimination on the basis of sex, race, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity, gender expression, age, sexual orientation, military status, veteran status, or any other basis protected by law. For more information, please read our [Diversity & Inclusion Statement](https://jobs.renesas.com/diversity-and-inclusion).

# Shape the Future

## We are transforming and creating a future as a leader in our industry. Working together, we are building relationships and partnerships with a shared focus – to make our lives easier through advanced semiconductor technology.

Search

![An image of a woman on a virtual meeting ](https://attraxcdnprod1-freshed3dgayb7c3.z01.azurefd.net/1481201/6df676c1-617c-475d-837f-a977f1893a8d/2026.5.19.19421/img/NCSQxdjzGkA2EgjcMTRHSg/)

![An image of a woman sitting at a computer](https://attraxcdnprod1-freshed3dgayb7c3.z01.azurefd.net/1481201/6df676c1-617c-475d-837f-a977f1893a8d/2026.5.19.19421/img/S1N_2aY1sEA2PgjcMTRHSg/)

![An image of two women speaking ](https://attraxcdnprod1-freshed3dgayb7c3.z01.azurefd.net/1481201/6df676c1-617c-475d-837f-a977f1893a8d/2026.5.19.19421/img/FXMJ9aiHr0g2PQjcMTRHSg/)

## Why Join Us

We asked our employees why they choose to work at Renesas, here’s what they said:

### You can progress with us

Our journey of transformation is an opportunity to progress your career, take ownership of solutions and truly make an impact

### We are embedded everywhere

Our variety of semiconductor solutions, and proud customer relationships offer the opportunity to innovate and solve complex problems across many industries, shaping future solutions and deepening your engineering knowledge

### We are global & flexible

You’ll find flexible work arrangements and global collaboration as part of our employee experience

## We are Renesas

With a diverse team of over 21,000 professionals and unmatched quality, we are meeting our global customers’ evolving needs by delivering scalable and comprehensive solutions in four growth segments: Automotive, Industrial, Infrastructure, and IoT.

Through digitalization, we are rapidly enhancing user experiences and driving innovation. Our passion for developing sustainable, power-efficient solutions for people and communities around the world knows no boundaries.

![](/assets/file/935f7e0c-8c45-49c0-933d-08dc8f47eef7/we_are_renesas.jpg)

## Together We Can Shape the Future

"I am pleased you are exploring opportunities with us.

At Renesas, we offer an exciting combination of world-leading technology and innovation, a commitment to quality, and dedication to customer satisfaction.

Our People and culture play a key role in making your experience at Renesas rewarding, and we need more talented people across geographies who are eager to advance their careers with us. Together we can continue to create a world powered by our products and solutions making a positive impact on the way we live and work – fulfilling our Purpose “To Make Our Lives Easier”.

A career with Renesas isn't just a job. It's an opportunity to make a meaningful impact."

**Hidetoshi Shibata, CEO**

![An image of CEO Hidetoshi Shibata](/assets/file/f25c87ed-cefa-4f79-eacc-08dc3138de46/toshi_home%2002.png)

## Hear from Our team

![A video of a Renesas employee](/assets/file/edfdaf95-7744-46de-eab4-08dc3138de46/RENE001_Nishika.png)

![A video of a Renesas employee](/assets/file/a8a59b6c-bc99-4dc2-eb95-08dc3138de46/RENE001_Tsuyoshi.png)

![A video of a Renesas employee](/assets/file/5d142fc9-1389-45e1-eab3-08dc3138de46/RENE001_Grace.png)

![A video of a Renesas employee](/assets/file/1fb062b8-bf37-4f7e-eb83-08dc3138de46/RENE001_Joseph.png)

![A video of a Renesas employee](/assets/file/76e776e9-38e0-4b12-eb96-08dc3138de46/RENE001_Wenqin.png)

![A video of a Renesas employee](/assets/file/d2a9f9ca-8dc6-425c-eb85-08dc3138de46/RENE001_Alex.png)

![A video of a Renesas employee](/assets/file/02d9a47f-ca94-45d3-eb81-08dc3138de46/RENE001_Fiona.png)

![A video of a Renesas employee](/assets/file/95b17e3e-e4a1-429a-356b-08dc3134474a/RENE001_Nitin.png)

![A video of a Renesas employee](/assets/file/1ba7b4b2-e24c-4fde-3633-08dc3134474a/RENE001_Seyda.png)

![A video of a Renesas employee](/assets/file/78a32005-ca07-4b4d-eb82-08dc3138de46/RENE001_Paris.png)

#### Nishika

**Firmware/Middleware Engineer, UK**

Meet Nishika, who went from a year-long internship to a full-time role as a firmware engineer. With a culture that supports her professional growth and development, Nishika is also working to educate more school children about careers in tech.

#### Tsuyoshi

**Director, Strategic Planning, Japan**

As a Director of Strategic Planning and also a Project Manager on a Global Software Expansion Project, Tsuyoshi is well aware of the Renesas drive to make people’s lives easier. It’s part of the joy of working at Renesas – but Tsuyoshi also enjoys the many opportunities on offer, and the blend of different cultures from around the world that combine to give the company its unique character.

#### Grace

**Sr Director, IT, Malaysia**

Based in Malaysia, Grace is a Senior Director for the Global Information System division. She believes Renesas is on a mission to transform the company into a world-class semiconductor manufacturing company.

#### Joseph

**Sales Account Manager, USA**

As a Sales Account Manager, Joseph has moved from intern to a full-time role. He has enjoyed the ongoing support and global flexibility that Renesas offers. Wherever you start in the business, and at whatever level, Joseph feels there is a real optimism around professional growth.

#### Wenqin

**Sr Staff Software Engineer, Japan**

Having studied electrical engineering, Wenqin worked as a researcher on a collaborative AI project between Tokyo University and Renesas. She appreciates the Renesas approach which encourages people to try new challenges and experience different projects. This attitude to discovery, means that there are always new ways to deliver better solutions for customers around the world.

#### Alex

**Software Engineer, USA**

With a fascination for computer architecture Alex has an equal passion for travel and has combined his career as a computer scientist with placements in Japan and the USA. For Alex the diverse people and opportunities create an exciting environment where you can explore new paths within the company.

#### Fiona

**Lab Technician, UK**

With an interest in electronics, Fiona has gone from work experience to full-time career as a lab technician. For Fiona, the people at Renesas make it special – although it’s a global company, she feels that the culture still has an encouraging family-feel.

#### Nitin

**Sr. Manager, Application Engineer, India**

Starting as an application engineer, Nitin has moved on to a more managerial role in the systems and solutions team. He believes that the two things that make Renesas unique are the people, and strong customer relationships.

#### Seyda

**Engineering Director, UK**

As an Engineering Director, Seyda has moved with Renesas from Turkey to the UK. The support to move and grow as a leader has also included mentoring and leadership training. Now Seyda is enjoying the opportunity to support more women and interns coming into the industry.

#### Paris

**Director, Sales, USA**

Having majored in electrical engineering, Paris began his career as a Global Account Manager but rapidly progressed and is now a Director of Sales. He loves the energy that comes from different cultures all working to create revolutionary products, and to constantly change and to do new things.

## Fair Hiring Practices

At Renesas we prioritize the safety and security of our job applicants. We want to make it clear that we will never ask candidates to pay any fees as part of the job application process. If you encounter any suspicious activity or if someone claiming to represent Renesas asks you to pay for a job opportunity, please do not proceed and contact us at [TA Renesas](mailto:Global_Data_Privacy_TA@dm.renesas.com "Email TA Renesas").

![](https://attraxcdnprod1-freshed3dgayb7c3.z01.azurefd.net/1481201/6df676c1-617c-475d-837f-a977f1893a8d/2026.5.19.19421/img/mEzcgOPZoEb9gQjcC23tNw/)
